title: Part Feeding Wizard Purge
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Purge

Purge

This screen is used to configure purge.

Item	Description

Enable Purge	Select this check box to enable purge.

Purge Location	Sets the location for purge. Parts will move (shift) to arrow direction during the purge operation. Select either of A, C or D.

The location that can be set differs depending on feeder model.

IF-80: A

IF-240, 380, 530: C, D
